title: notifications-sms — webhook namespaces
description: This module handles two INBOUND webhook types via webhook module: delivery receipts AND inbound SMS (for STOP-keyword processing). Outbound SMS-scoped events published via notifications CORE.

inboundNamespace.downstream_handler: IngestSmsProviderWebhookListener → IngestSmsProviderWebhookJob → branches to delivery-receipt or STOP-keyword handling

supportedProviders.note: Twilio's X-Twilio-Signature header verified against auth token.

expected_events: Delivery via SNS — receipts via CloudWatch or SNS topic
supportedProviders.note: AWS SNS delivery reporting is via CloudWatch (not direct webhooks). Inbound SMS requires AWS End User Messaging setup.

outbound.note: SMS-channel outbound events (sms.delivered / opted_out / cost_recorded) aggregated + published by notifications CORE via channel-neutral event names.
